RT by @DXBMediaOffice: RT by @DXBMediaOffice: I met with leaders of Sweden's Ministry of Health and Social Affairs as part of an official visit aimed at strengthening partnerships and exchanging expertise in healthcare, social welfare, and integrated care. We believe that investing in people’s health and well-being is an investment in the future of societies. With this vision in mind, we discussed opportunities for cooperation in developing more sustainable and resilient healthcare and social welfare systems, and explored how innovation and proactive policies can help enhance quality of life and build healthier and more prosperous communities.

RT by @DXBMediaOffice: RT by @DXBMediaOffice: It was a pleasure to meet Her Royal Highness Crown Princess Victoria of Sweden in Stockholm during an official visit to Sweden. We reviewed the growing bilateral relations between our two countries and discussed opportunities to enhance cooperation and exchange expertise across a number of vital sectors, supporting sustainable development and shared prosperity. This visit reflects the depth of the relationship between the United Arab Emirates and the Kingdom of Sweden, and the continued progress it is witnessing across various fields.
